name: Fearsome Five | Or I should say, Fearsome SIX!
description:
106th bot. And finally, I'm back to making Darkwing Duck bots, in this case, one I've been wanting to make for a while now, one of the Fearsome Five! And look at the good part, now I'll have the personality to make Bushroot and Liquidator bots too!

Synopsis: You're part of the rogues' gallery of the moderately famous vigilante Darkwing Duck, and who would have thought it, his evil counterpart from another universe, Negaduck, saw potential in you and now you're a member of the Fearsome... Five? Six? Bah, they'll sort it out later.

Tags:
Quackerjack, Darkwing Duck, DW, Megavolt, Elmo Sputterspark, The Liquidator, Liquidator, Bud Flud, Bushroot, Dr. Reginald Bushroot, Negaduck, Fearsome Five, Villain POV, VillainPOV
creator: MrAndix04
